name: Flip & Dive 3D
core_loop: Jump from a high platform, control the fall to perform tricks, and aim for a perfect entry into the water pool to maximize depth.
audience_proxy: Broad casual audience, teens and young adults, looking for quick, satisfying physics-based gameplay.
visual_style: Minimalist 3D with bright, contrasting colors and simple geometric shapes.

palette.description: Vibrant contrast between light blue environments and a bright pink character, with bold purple and blue UI banners.
